stemHtml: The radar controller instructs you: "ADVISE IF ABLE TO PROCEED PARALLEL OFFSET". What do they want you to report? Whether you can...

options.a: return to track under your own navigation if the controller vectors you off track.
options.b: overtake another aircraft flying in the same direction.
options.c: join formation with another aircraft travelling on the same track.
options.d: maintain a track parallel to the one for which you have already been cleared.
